results.snippet: AGNTCY is an open-source framework for building interoperable AI agent systems. It provides standardized protocols for agent-to-agent communication, enabling multi-agent orchestration across different platforms and providers.

SLIM (Standardized Lightweight Interoperable Model) is a core component of the AGNTCY ecosystem. It defines a minimal, portable agent interface that any framework can implement to participate in multi-agent workflows.
Getting started with AGNTCY requires installing the SDK and registering your agent with a hub. The onboarding process includes agent card creation, capability declaration, and connectivity testing.
